name: fot-ai
description: A multilingual event photo studio with secure accounts, generation history, and an operator console.

scripts.check: node --check src/client/app.js && node --check src/server/server.js && node --check src/server/routes/adminPin.js && node --check src/server/routes/fototimeStable.js && node --check src/server/services/identityStore.js && node --check src/server/services/imageProviderService.js
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run check && npm test

author: Natalia Bedareva
